texto: I used to help my grandfather on the farm, driving tractors, raising crops and animals. I used to feed some of the baby cows and pigs, and I had to be no older than 7 or 8. Then at about 9 or 10 I started driving tractors. It showed me at an early age what hard work was all about and how dedicated you have to be, no matter what you do.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Tyson Chandler sobre temas ligados a familia. A afirmação “I used to help my grandfather on the farm, driving tractors, raising crops and animals. I used to…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a familia, work, hard-work, útil em momentos de trabalho e hard-work.

frase_original: I used to help my grandfather on the farm, driving tractors, raising crops and animals. I used to feed some of the baby cows and pigs, and I had to be no older than 7 or 8. Then at about 9 or 10 I started driving tractors. It showed me at an early age what hard work was all about and how dedicated you have to be, no matter what you do.

texto: I play knowing that there is somebody watching me out there in the crowd that has never had the opportunity to watch a game before and it might be the only chance they ever to see one, live in person. Michael Jordan once said that in an interview, and I really took it to heart; whenever I step on the floor, I play for that person.
explicacao: Citação de Tyson Chandler sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “I play knowing that there is somebody watching me out there in the crowd that has never had the o…” articula amor, opportunity, heart em registro de amor, com relevância para contextos como heart e me.
